narrative:
Fairview Park-03-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,217 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 14.4 percentage points.
